title: Iran War Heads Toward Legal Showdown as May 1 Deadline Nears
snippet: War Powers Resolution 60-day deadline is May 1 — now 3 days away. Legal experts debate whether Trump can continue war without congressional authorization. Trump can extend 30 days for safe withdrawal but not for continued prosecution. Senate blocked WPR resolutions 5 times. Administration expected to invoke AUMF (2001) or Article II to bypass. Congressional authorization remains uncertain due to deep divisions.
tag_reason: WPR 데드라인 추적의 후속. 3일 앞으로 다가오면서 법적 대결 구도 신규 분석.
